name: Telesat Corporation Class A Common Shares and Class B Variable Voting Shares
summary: Telesat Corporation provides satellite-based communications services, offering broadband connectivity and solutions for enterprise, government, and mobility customers. The company owns and operates a global fleet of satellites and is headquartered in Ottawa, Canada. Telesat is developing Telesat Lightspeed, a low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite constellation for high-speed, low-latency broadband.
